items.title: I Predicted This ETF Was a Buy for Passive Income, and It's Already Up 13% in 2026. Is There More Room to Run?
items.author: Daniel Foelber
items.description: The State Street Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLP) has surged 13.2% in 2026, significantly outperforming the S&P 500's 1.3% gain. The rally is driven by a sector rotation away from expensive growth stocks like Amazon and Microsoft toward value and income-focused stocks. Consumer staples, which was the worst-performing sector in 2025, is now the third-best performer in 2026, offering reliable dividends and stable earnings through economic cycles.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: ETF is up 13.2% in 2026, significantly outperforming the S&P 500. Recommended as a solid foundational holding for passive income investors with a 2.6% yield, low 0.08% expense ratio, and quality holdings. Author maintains bullish stance despite valuation increase.
Top holding in XLP with strong market position. Consumer staples sector leader benefiting from sector rotation toward value stocks and reliable dividend payments.
Top holding in XLP, representing quality value-stock exposure with reliable earnings and dividend growth as a Dividend King candidate.
Top holding in XLP and confirmed Dividend King with 50+ years of consecutive dividend increases. Author holds positions in this stock.
Top holding in XLP and Dividend King with stable, growing dividends. Benefits from consumer staples sector strength.
Experiencing significant selloff after earnings with concerns over $200 billion 2026 capex spending on AI and cloud infrastructure. Risk that spending may outpace cash flows and require debt funding.

Down significantly year-to-date following earnings reports. Concerns about excessive quarterly capex spending on AI infrastructure exceeding historical annual amounts, raising questions about return on investment.
Dividend King in consumer staples sector benefiting from sector rotation and reliable dividend growth.
Dividend King in consumer staples sector with 50+ years of consecutive dividend increases, representing quality income-generating investment.

items.title: I Pegged This Dividend King as My Top Value Stock to Buy for 2026, and It's Already Up 11% This Year. Here's Why This Passive Income Powerhouse Is Still a Buy Now.
items.description: Procter & Gamble and the broader consumer staples sector are showing no signs of slowing down.

items.title: Cascade® Launches "Clean Machine" Experiential Tour Inviting Consumers Inside the Dishwasher to See What "Clean" Really Means with Cascade Platinum Plus
items.description: CINCINNATI, February 11, 2026--This weekend, Cascade®, America’s #1 recommended dishwasher detergent brand*, is taking consumers inside the dishwasher with its new Cascade Clean Machine debuting at the Florida State Fair. This experiential tour is a first-of-its-kind immersive experience to unshroud the mystery of what happens inside the dishwasher when Cascade Platinum Plus gets to work.

items.title: Head & Shoulders Launches BARE Itchy Scalp Relief Serum to Prevent Recurring Itch and Flakes Between Washes
items.description: CINCINNATI, February 11, 2026--Head & Shoulders, the world's #1 anti-dandruff shampoo, introduces Head & Shoulders BARE Itchy Scalp Relief Serum, a breakthrough scalp care solution designed to extend dandruff protection and itch relief beyond traditional wash days.
